title: TrackerAgentSession
description: Active AgentSession state. Linear's 2026 agent-delegation protocol. Capability-gated (`agent_session`) — Linear-only as of 2026; absent on Jira/GitHub/Asana/Trello. Append-only thread of ingress+egress events with a 5-second response budget enforced by the engine.

session_id.description: Linear AgentSession UUID — the conversation thread on Linear's side.

issue_id.description: Linear Issue UUID the session is operating on.

houston_agent_path.description: Workspace-relative Houston agent path the session was routed to.

houston_session_key.description: Internal Houston session key (links to chat_feed in houston-db for replay).

state.description: AgentSessionEvent state machine. `working` must be emitted within 5s of receipt.

thread.description: Append-only event log — ingress (from Linear) + egress (to Linear).

payload.description: Provider-native event body; shape varies by `kind`.
